title: gilia humilis subsp. glabella
intro: Gilia humilis subsp. glabella, also known as the desert gilia, is a plant species that belongs to the Polemoniaceae family, characterized by its delicate purple flowers. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Gilia humilis subsp. glabella include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as an expectorant, making it a valuable remedy for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve making teas, infusions, or tinctures from the flowers and leaves, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
